overall.description: Gameplay footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a Na'vi character exploring a lush alien mountain environment. The character traverses mossy cliff paths, gathers resources from bioluminescent flora, and moves through sunlit and shaded forest areas with floating mountains visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking along mossy cliff edge overlooking vast valley with floating mountain formations in the distance

entered.detail: large gnarled tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches covered in moss
massive rock formation floating in the sky with a natural arch shape
narrow walking path along cliff edge covered in bright green moss
tall alien plant with spiral-shaped purple flower head

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide vista overlooking a vast valley with floating mountains in the distance. The Na'vi character walks along a mossy cliff path bordered by twisted ancient trees and alien flora under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: resource gathering spot at cliff base

events.description: character interacts with bioluminescent red plant to gather resources, camera temporarily switches to first-person view for gathering animation

agents.ego_description: approaching and harvesting a glowing red resource node attached to a moss-covered tree trunk

entered.detail: mossy tree trunk with glowing red bioluminescent resource node
thick tree trunk covered in vines and moss with purple hanging tendrils

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a mossy tree with a glowing red resource node. The camera switches to first-person view briefly as the character gathers the resource, then returns to third-person as the character continues along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit rocky mountain path with stone steps

events.description: character climbs up a moss-covered rock ledge to reach higher elevation

agents.ego_description: walking and climbing along rocky terrain beside cliff walls, ascending mossy stone steps

entered.detail: steep rock face with horizontal sedimentary layers covered in patches of moss
long green vines draping down from above
massive tree with spreading branches forming a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a sunlit rocky path between cliff walls, ascending moss-covered stone steps. Large canopy trees and hanging vines become visible as the elevation increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest corridor along cliff base

events.description: character moves from bright sunlight into deep shade under dense forest canopy

agents.ego_description: walking through shaded forest path alongside tall rock wall under dense tree cover

entered.detail: vertical cliff face with rough texture running alongside the path
large rounded boulder covered in green moss and lichen
thick overhead tree cover blocking most of the sky

segments.scene_description: The character enters a deeply shaded forest corridor where tall rock walls rise on the right and dense vegetation fills the left side. The lighting shifts dramatically to diffused shade under the forest canopy as the character continues along the winding path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a bright, open mountain vista into the cool, diffused shadows of a dense forest corridor. It begins with a wide view of a vast valley and floating mountains as a Na'vi character walks along a mossy cliff path under the midday sun. As the character pauses to gather a glowing red resource from an ancient tree, the camera briefly shifts perspective before returning to follow the ascent up moss-covered stone steps. The scene then opens up to reveal large canopy trees and hanging vines while the path winds between towering cliff walls. Finally, the lighting shifts dramatically from brilliant sunlight to deep shade as the character enters a narrow forest corridor flanked by high rock walls and thick vegetation.
